name: BlazeMeter API
what_it_does: Cloud load testing platform with REST API for running scalable performance tests using JMeter, Gatling, k6, Locust, and Selenium scripts at any scale from the cloud.
use_cases: Triggering load tests as part of CI/CD pipelines via API
Collecting performance metrics and thresholds from completed load test runs
Spinning up distributed load generators across multiple geographic regions
Comparing performance results across releases to detect regressions
Generating shareable performance reports for stakeholder review
not_for: Unit or integration testing (use pytest/Jest instead)
Simple API response validation (use Postman/Hoppscotch instead)
best_when: An agent needs to orchestrate large-scale cloud load tests as part of automated release validation.
avoid_when: You can run load tests locally with k6 or Locust and don't need cloud-scale distributed testing.

auth.notes: API key from account settings. Single key grants full account access. Key passed via Authorization header as 'Bearer {key}'.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial with limited concurrent users; 50 VU/10min test limit
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise plans from $1,200/month; trial contact required for pricing
pricing.notes: BlazeMeter is enterprise-focused. Free trial for evaluation. Pricing by virtual users and test duration. Acquired by Perforce in 2022.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits apply per account tier; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation is available but not always current. Error responses are JSON with status codes and messages. Taurus open-source CLI provides a Python SDK layer.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Test run creation is not idempotent — each API call creates a new test run. Agents should check for existing running tests before creating new ones.
known_agent_gotchas: Test completion must be polled - no webhook until test finishes (webhooks for reports only)
JMeter test files must be uploaded before test creation via a separate file upload API
Rate limits are not documented and vary by account tier
Free trial limits make automated testing impractical without a paid plan

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Single API key model with no scopes. SOC2 certified. Data stored in US/EU based on account region.
